mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly increasing present values of future equity cash flows and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, triggering immediate sell-offs in equity markets over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized growth in real GDP and real personal consumption expenditures confirms broad-based economic expansion, reducing recession probabilities and supporting sustained positive equity returns over the quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to predict positive 60d returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates tightening capacity utilization and rising corporate profit margins, driving short-term momentum in equity prices within the next trading week.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum yields negative 5-day forward returns in > 55% of observations during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated policy rates combined with rising unemployment indicate a restrictive monetary stance failing to sustain employment, creating stagflationary pressures that force equity deleveraging and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint condition produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of cases, contradicting the stagflationary sell-off mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 1.2 million units signal robust construction sector activity and high consumer confidence, transmitting positive sentiment to broader equity markets over the following month.
failure_condition: HOUST values above 1200.0 are followed by negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Steady increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect consistent job creation and rising aggregate wages, supporting long-term corporate revenue growth and generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive PAYEMS trends fail to correlate with positive 60d returns (Rank IC < 0.02) across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid month-over-month increases in the consumer price index trigger immediate expectations of central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative short-term market returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above 0.3% MoM are followed by positive 5-day returns in > 58% of cases.
